_comment: POST /api/v1/application-configs — Ollama LLM server on agentsonly cluster (CC-059/CC-080)

_schema_review.values_override: str — per-cluster values override (empty = use application-level values_yaml)
_schema_review.external_hosts: list[str] — external hostnames; ollama.podzone.cloud will be routed here after DNS cut-over from openclaw

_note: OLLAMA_API_KEY is injected via K8s secret 'ollama-api-key' in the HelmRelease (CC-080 Option B). DNS cut-over for ollama.podzone.cloud is a separate step — see agentsonly-infra CLAUDE.md.
